task_snapshots.title: 340b-2: BernsteinClient API Integration
task_snapshots.description:
Implement HTTP + SSE client for Bernstein server at localhost:8052. [subtask of 5ff131752f18]

## Scope
- Create packages/vscode/src/BernsteinClient.ts with:
  - HTTP client wrapper (axios or native fetch)
  - Methods: getDashboard(), getTasks(), getAgents(), streamAgentLogs(), killAgent(), getCosts(), getEvents()
  - SSE connection handler for /events endpoint with reconnection logic
  - Type definitions for all API response shapes
  - Error handling with exponential backoff on connection failures
  - Event emitter pattern for subscribers (e.g., onTasksUpdated, onAgentSpawned)
- Create packages/vscode/src/__tests__/BernsteinClient.test.ts:
  - Mock HTTP responses
  - Test all endpoint methods
  - Test SSE connection and disconnect
  - Test reconnection logic

## Endpoints to support (from design doc)
- GET /dashboard/data
- GET /tasks
- GET /agents/{id}/stream (SSE)
- POST /agents/{id}/kill
- GET /costs/live
- GET /events (SSE)
- POST /shutdown

## Completion Criteria
✓ BernsteinClient.ts fully typed and exports all methods
✓ All HTTP methods tested and passing
✓ SSE connections work with mock server (localhost:8052)
✓ Reconnection logic tested (max 5 retries with backoff)
✓ Event emitter notifies subscribers on data changes
✓ npm run test -- BernsteinClient passes all tests
